series_metadata.series_description: Series of correspondence covering situations where Medicare has paid for an employee’s insurance claim as the primary pay instead of the secondary pay. Documents include correspondence between Human Resources Benefit office, the insurance carrier, Medicare and collection agencies as well as the SHRD tracking log.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until the case is closed plus 5 years then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until the case is closed plus 5 years then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
